false_form: The type-2 tensor constant in T#72 has the standard textbook regime structure of matrix Bernstein.
name: TYPE2_FIVE_REGION_RARE
true_form: Type-2 tensor constant has unusual five-region simultaneity (regimes: matrix_r2, p_geq_2r, p_lt_2r, p_eq_infty, plus a fifth boundary regime). Five-application convergence is RARE; Learner trained on textbook matrix Bernstein hallucinates sqrt(log d) for tensors. Tagged PATTERN_BASE_RATE_NEGLECT.
